queries.question: Show bookings for both patios and verandas that seat 40 people.
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.FullName
FROM Tables JOIN FloorPlan ON Tables.TableID = FloorPlan.TableId JOIN Reservations ON Reservations.TableId = Tables.TableID JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Reservations.CustomerID
WHERE (Tables.SeatingArea = "Patio" OR Tables.SeatingArea = "Veranda") AND FloorPlan.NumberOfSeats = 40
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?tables a :Tables .
  ?floorplan a :FloorPlan .
  ?floorplan p:hasTables ?tables .
  ?reservations a :Reservations .
  ?reservations p:hasTables ?tables .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?reservations p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?tables p:SeatingArea ?seatingarea_w .
  ?tables p:SeatingArea ?seatingarea_w2 .
  ?floorplan p:NumberOfSeats ?numberofseats_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?seatingarea_w) = "Patio" || STR(?seatingarea_w2) = "Veranda")) && (STR(?numberofseats_w) = "40" || STR(?numberofseats_w) = "40.0")))
}

queries.question: Display bookings for the patios and verandas where 40 people can be seated.
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.FullName
FROM Tables JOIN FloorPlan ON Tables.TableID = FloorPlan.TableId JOIN Reservations ON Reservations.TableId = Tables.TableID JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Reservations.CustomerID
WHERE Tables.SeatingArea = "Patio" OR Tables.SeatingArea = "Veranda" AND FloorPlan.NumberOfSeats = 40
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?tables a :Tables .
  ?floorplan a :FloorPlan .
  ?floorplan p:hasTables ?tables .
  ?reservations a :Reservations .
  ?reservations p:hasTables ?tables .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?reservations p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?tables p:SeatingArea ?seatingarea_w .
  ?tables p:SeatingArea ?seatingarea_w2 .
  ?floorplan p:NumberOfSeats ?numberofseats_w .
  FILTER((STR(?seatingarea_w) = "Patio" || (STR(?seatingarea_w2) = "Veranda" && (STR(?numberofseats_w) = "40" || STR(?numberofseats_w) = "40.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display bookings for the patios and verandas where 40 people can be seated.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?tables a :Tables .
  ?floorplan a :FloorPlan .
  ?floorplan p:hasTables ?tables .
  ?reservations a :Reservations .
  ?reservations p:hasTables ?tables .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?reservations p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?tables p:SeatingArea ?seatingarea_w .
  ?tables p:SeatingArea ?seatingarea_w2 .
  ?floorplan p:NumberOfSeats ?numberofseats_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?seatingarea_w) = "Patio" || STR(?seatingarea_w2) = "Veranda")) && (STR(?numberofseats_w) = "40" || STR(?numberofseats_w) = "40.0")))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?tables a :Tables .
  ?floorplan a :FloorPlan .
  ?floorplan p:hasTables ?tables .
  ?reservations a :Reservations .
  ?reservations p:hasTables ?tables .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?reservations p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?tables p:SeatingArea ?seatingarea_w .
  ?tables p:SeatingArea ?seatingarea_w2 .
  ?floorplan p:NumberOfSeats ?numberofseats_w .
  FILTER((STR(?seatingarea_w) = "Patio" || (STR(?seatingarea_w2) = "Veranda" && (STR(?numberofseats_w) = "40" || STR(?numberofseats_w) = "40.0"))))
} }
}
